title: submod command introduces 'inout' ports which results in simulation failures
code_blocks:
read -noverific
read -sv test.v
hierarchy -check -top dut
prep
flatten
opt_clean

check
select -module dut

select $procdff$24
select -add $and$test.v:12$14
select -add $and$test.v:12$12
select -add $and$test.v:12$16
select -add $and$test.v:12$8
submod -name part__0
check

select $procdff$23
select -add $procdff$22
select -add $procdff$20
select -add $procdff$19
select -add $procdff$21
select -add $procdff$27
select -add $and$test.v:12$10
select -add $and$test.v:12$18
select -add $procdff$25
select -add $procdff$26
select -add $and$test.v:12$4
select -add $and$test.v:12$6
select -add $not$test.v:17$2
submod -name part__1

opt
check

write_verilog -noattr output.v
select -clear

show -prefix dut -format dot dut
show -prefix part__0 -format dot part__0
show -prefix part__1 -format dot part__1
